The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] successfully '''defended''' their [[Outpost D-34]] from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY]].

==The prologue==
Following the [[Skirmish at Outpost D-34|capture]] of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Onece 3]]'', the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] realized that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] would retaliate by destroying [[Outpost D-34]], so they sent three [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] from Alpha, Beta, and Gamma squadrons. They were to patrol the station and hold of any Rebel attack until the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Hammer (Imperial-class)|''Hammer'']], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Flanken]] would arrive to relieve them. Flanken planned to not arrive until much later believing that the initial attack was either a feint or they're testing the situation, once they would commence the full force he would hit them with full power.

==The battle==
A series of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], starting with [[Petdur Squadron|Petdur]], [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]], and [[Laire Squadron|Laire]] squadrons, attacked the outpost. The [[Mugaari pirates]] Y-wings went for the fighters while the Rebel Y-wings launch torpedo attacks onto the outpost. All of the Y-wings were destroyed however by the stations TIE pilots in the TIE Fighters, including [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]]. Soon afterward, a couple of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]], which consisted of [[Derk Squadron|Derk]] and [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue]] squadrons, attacked the station, which were also destroyed in the attempt. Stele then spotted Rebel officers in the ''[[Scutz]]'', a stolen shuttle, who were trying to flee through the system he then identified it and three [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] were sent to disable the shuttle. When it was, a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|stormtrooper transport]] then boarded the shuttle and the Rebel officers were soon captured by the Imperials. During this, two more Y-wings from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] attacked the station but were also destroyed.

When the ''Hammer'' arrived, the Rebel ''[[Ubote group]]'', consisting of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], also came to intervene. The ''Hammer'' then sent [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to help the station's defenses destroy them. Maarek Stele kept his distance as he knew his TIE Fighter was no match for the corvettes.

==Aftermath==
The Imperials successfully thwarted the Rebel attack and captured some Rebel officers at the same time. They soon traced the attack to a [[Mugaari cargo loading area]] in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]] where they would then decide to [[Battle of the Tungra sector|counterattack]] the pirates and the Rebels.

==Behind the scenes==
This is Battle 1, mission 2 in the game.

This is the storyline of the mission following "medium" difficulty. In hard difficulty the Mugaari fighter squadrons will have two fighters instead of one. Also the Rebel Y-wings may have [[Proton bomb/Legends|space bombs]] instead of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedos]].
